summary.intent: Filter out empty or orphaned checkpoints that have no associated log events from both the server and client sides.
summary.outcome: Two uncommitted changes were made: a server-side filter in server.ts skipping checkpoints with no log events, and a client-side filter in SessionDetail.tsx showing only checkpoints present in the groups map.

repo: Checkpoints can exist without associated log events, requiring filtering at both server and client layers.
The app uses a groups map on the client side (SessionDetail.tsx) to track which checkpoints have items.

code.finding: Server-side checkpoint filtering: skip checkpoints with no associated log events.
Client-side sidebar filter: only render checkpoints that have entries in the groups map.

workflow: Defensive filtering at both server and client layers provides redundancy for data integrity issues like orphaned records.

open_items: Changes are uncommitted on branch ParsingEntireLog — needs commit or further review before merging.
Root cause of orphaned checkpoints (checkpoints with no log events) is not addressed, only filtered.
